text.title: Personas Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-interview-count
step.decision-gate: If <6, run more interviews before persona work.

step.name: cluster-on-goals-behaviours
step.action: Group participants by goals + behaviours; reject clusters supported by <2 participants.

step.name: draft-personas
step.action: Write each persona: name, goals, frustrations, behaviours, context, scenario, JTBD, verbatim quote + ID.

step.name: pair-with-jtbd
step.action: Write JTBD pairing for each persona.

step.name: date-stamp-and-publish
step.action: Stamp date; mark DRAFT until validated against ≥10 users; publish.
